title: La comédie du bonheur
writer: André Cerf, Jean Cocteau, Nicolas Evreinoff
actors: Michel Simon, Ramon Novarro, Jacqueline Delubac
plot: Monsieur Jourdain is a dangerous madman : he wants to share his fortune! His relatives do what any sensible fellow on earth would do: they have him committed to a mental hospital. But Jourdain manages to escape and decides to make...
